system.description: Translated as “Lightning”, the El Rayo style teaches people how to fight very effectively with a whip. Speed and sheer boldness make this style stand out. Because this style often employs the whip as a tool for acrobatic stunts, the Born Athlete Boon is recommended.

benefit.description: While using a whip, you can make the Grapple and Shove/Trip maneuvers using Flair instead of Might. You may also make the Quick Cut Maneuver with a whip (normally Quick Cut is only for bladed weapons). When using a whip to do Quick Cut, it does 1d2 damage each hit instead of half normal damage (but you cannot add your Might to this damage).
benefit.name: Swift as Lightning

finalSecret.description: You are extremely adept at performing Stunts to take down Pawns. When using your whip to perform a stunt (like swinging into a group of Pawns like a wrecking ball, tripping them to fall like dominoes down the stairs, or simply cracking the whip to terrorize them into fleeing), you get a Bonus Die.
finalSecret.name: Master of Stunts
